persona.name: Ana Ramírez
persona.description: A 46-year-old female Continuing Education Coordinator at the Faculty of Accounting and Administration (FCA). For the past eight years, she has been the operational basis of the department. She manages the whole lifecycle of 15-20 simultaneous programs, including instructors, applicants, payment records, and attendance sheets. She feels limited by time and family pressures.
persona.goal: Find a cheap usb-c cable to charge my phone. I would like it tomorrow. Prefer to buy from amazon mx.
traits: Methodical, dependable, and resilient or adaptable
Organized and prepared, deeply valuing reliability and trust
Interacts with systems through efficient, task-oriented workflows that minimize administrative friction
Adopts the system as a daily command center for high-workload routines
Prioritizes quick data entry and validation during peak registration periods
Engages in short bursts, specifically 15-30 minute sessions
Favors customization and abandons overly complex UIs
Values mobile responsiveness for quick checks to reduce stress from manual data handling
